{{Quote|They produce barq, kushayan, and fifty percent of the luxury foodstuffs and beverages in the galaxy.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arligan Zey]] speaks about Qiilura|<ref name="RC:HC" />}}
'''Kushayan''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of luxury crop [[Plant/Legends|plant]] grown on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] Separatist [[Lik Ankkit]] owned a [[Lik Ankkit's villa|villa]] built in Qiilura's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Imbraani]] which overlooked a Kushayan plantation. During a [[Mission to Qiilura|Republic mission]] on Qiilura [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Darman Skirata|Darman]] used strips of dried Kushayan, along with other crops, to hide the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] gear while they transported it on a cart to a safe house.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kushayan first appeared in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' a novel written by [[Karen Traviss]] and released in [[2004]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
